texto: Leela: Why are we listening to them? It is a waste of time.The Doctor; It is difficult to know what will be a waste of time until after the time has been wasted, by which time it is too late. So predicting what will be a waste of time is something of a waste of time. Unless it gives you pleasure of course when it probably doesn't count as a waste of time.Leela (yawning): I am sorry I did not hear what you said, Doctor.The Doctor (smiling): That was a waste of time then.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Chris Boucher que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Leela: Why are we listening to them? It is a waste of time.The Doctor; It is difficult to know wh…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, doctor-who, science-fiction, com foco em humor e science-fiction.

texto: Our essence is change. We are movement. Being out of balance is life. Perfect balance. Stasis. That is death. Life yearns for perfection. Death is perfection.
explicacao: Citação de Chris Boucher sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Our essence is change. We are movement. Being out of balance is life. Perfect balance. Stasis. Th…” articula motivacao, death, inspiracional em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como luto e mudanca.
